name: Barbecued Chicken Wings- Peak Gai Yang
recipeInstructions:
This is a favorite barbecue recipe. The enticing aroma of the sizzling meat on the grill makes it very popular with the street vendors' clientele.
Combine all the marinade ingredients and marinate the chicken wings overnight. Grill the wings over medium coals for 5 to 7 minutes on each side until they are cooked through and golden brown. Serve with steamed sticky rice.
